pitchSequence.description: Fastball inside
Lifted to left field, down the line, knuckles and lands into the stands
Fastball upstairs
Swung on and hit in the air to right field. Palomar will have room and makes the catch

notes: 4-pitch AB, flyout to Palomar in right. Count was 2-1 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina.

pitchSequence.description: Popped foul of first and into the stands
Fastball up at the chin
Slider in the dirt
Roller to first. Nakamura will have it unassisted and steps on the bag to retire Vega

notes: 4-pitch AB, groundout 3U (unassisted). Count was 2-1 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball up and in
Hammered foul and out of play
Big chopper to short, gobbled up by Slauson who fires to first to retire Sunderland to end the inning

notes: 3-pitch AB, groundout 6-3. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Another 1-2-3 inning for Padolina.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses low
Fastball up and in
Slider misses low, Sanborn falls behind three and oh
Fastball for a called strike
Chopped foul and out of play, count runs full
Driven into deep right field, Bradleys racing back. Bounces off the top of the right field wall. Patterson hustling for second and slides in safely

notes: 6-pitch AB, leadoff double off the right field wall. Full count when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Sanborn.

pitchSequence.description: Slider misses low
Lined into center field, drops in for a base hit. Vega plays it on a bounce. Patterson moves up safely to third

notes: 2-pitch AB, single to center. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty-lefty matchup. Patterson advances to third.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball just misses low
Hit in the air to shallow center. Stipe drifting back and makes the catch. Patterson has to hold at third

notes: 2-pitch AB, flyout to Stipe in shallow center. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Patterson holds at third, runners on corners with one out.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball paints the corner for a called strike
Fastball down and away
Driven to deep right field. Bradleys racing back and runs out of room as it sails over the wall. Three-run homer for Palomar

notes: 3-pitch AB, three-run home run to right field. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Righty-lefty matchup. Cars take a 3-0 lead.

pitchSequence.description: Slider misses low
Fastball high and tight
Hammered foul and out of play
Lined into left center, drops into the gap for a base hit

notes: 4-pitch AB, single to left center. Count was 2-1 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Chopper to short. Stipe to second for one, over to first just in time. 6-4-3 double play to end the inning

notes: 1-pitch AB, 6-4-3 double play. First pitch put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Cars score 3 runs in the inning. Cadillac 3, Lake City 0.
